checks.name: view_document_safety_user
checks.description: User can ViewDocument only if: owner, in viewACL, in manageACL, or publicAccess is view/edit

checks.name: view_document_safety_public
checks.description: Public can ViewDocument only if publicAccess is view or edit

checks.name: modify_document_safety
checks.description: User can ModifyDocument only if: owner, in modifyACL, or publicAccess is edit

checks.name: delete_document_safety
checks.description: User can DeleteDocument only if: owner or in manageACL

checks.name: edit_is_private_safety
checks.description: User can EditIsPrivate only if: owner or in manageACL

checks.name: edit_public_access_safety
checks.description: User can EditPublicAccess only if: owner or in manageACL

checks.name: add_to_share_acl_safety
checks.description: User can AddToShareACL only if: owner or in manageACL

checks.name: delete_group_safety
checks.description: User can DeleteGroup only if they are the group owner and authenticated

checks.name: modify_group_safety
checks.description: User can ModifyGroup only if they are the group owner and authenticated

checks.name: blocking_view_forbid
checks.description: ViewDocument is denied when principal is in owner's blocked set (bidirectional blocking enforced)

checks.name: blocking_modify_forbid
checks.description: ModifyDocument is denied when principal is in owner's blocked set (bidirectional blocking enforced)

checks.name: auth_required_view
checks.description: User cannot ViewDocument without authentication

checks.name: auth_required_modify
checks.description: User cannot ModifyDocument without authentication

checks.name: auth_required_delete
checks.description: User cannot DeleteDocument without authentication

checks.name: org_isolation_view
checks.description: User cannot ViewDocument cross-org unless in manageACL

checks.name: org_isolation_modify
checks.description: User cannot ModifyDocument cross-org unless in manageACL

checks.name: org_isolation_delete
checks.description: User cannot DeleteDocument cross-org unless in manageACL

checks.name: org_isolation_add_share
checks.description: User cannot AddToShareACL cross-org unless in manageACL

checks.name: floor_owner_view
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated, same org, and not blocked

checks.name: floor_owner_modify
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated, same org, and not blocked

checks.name: floor_owner_delete
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to DeleteDocument when authenticated and same org

checks.name: floor_view_acl
checks.description: User in viewACL MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated, same org, and not blocked

checks.name: floor_modify_acl
checks.description: User in modifyACL MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated, same org, and not blocked

checks.name: floor_manage_acl_delete
checks.description: User in manageACL MUST be able to DeleteDocument when authenticated (manageACL bypasses org isolation)

checks.name: floor_public_view
checks.description: Public principal MUST be able to ViewDocument when publicAccess is view

checks.name: floor_group_owner_delete
checks.description: Group owner MUST be able to DeleteGroup when authenticated

checks.name: liveness_view_document_user
checks.description: ViewDocument for User is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_modify_document
checks.description: ModifyDocument is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete_document
checks.description: DeleteDocument is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_add_to_share_acl
checks.description: AddToShareACL is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_delete_group
checks.description: DeleteGroup is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_create_document
checks.description: CreateDocument is not trivially deny-all

results.description: User can ViewDocument only if: owner, in viewACL, in manageACL, or publicAccess is view/edit
Public can ViewDocument only if publicAccess is view or edit
User can ModifyDocument only if: owner, in modifyACL, or publicAccess is edit
User can DeleteDocument only if: owner or in manageACL
User can EditIsPrivate only if: owner or in manageACL
User can EditPublicAccess only if: owner or in manageACL
User can AddToShareACL only if: owner or in manageACL
User can DeleteGroup only if they are the group owner and authenticated
User can ModifyGroup only if they are the group owner and authenticated
ViewDocument is denied when principal is in owner's blocked set (bidirectional blocking enforced)
ModifyDocument is denied when principal is in owner's blocked set (bidirectional blocking enforced)
User cannot ViewDocument without authentication
User cannot ModifyDocument without authentication
User cannot DeleteDocument without authentication
User cannot ViewDocument cross-org unless in manageACL
User cannot ModifyDocument cross-org unless in manageACL
User cannot DeleteDocument cross-org unless in manageACL
User cannot AddToShareACL cross-org unless in manageACL
Owner MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated, same org, and not blocked
Owner MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated, same org, and not blocked
Owner MUST be able to DeleteDocument when authenticated and same org
User in viewACL MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated, same org, and not blocked
User in modifyACL MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated, same org, and not blocked
User in manageACL MUST be able to DeleteDocument when authenticated (manageACL bypasses org isolation)
Public principal MUST be able to ViewDocument when publicAccess is view
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: Public::"", action: Action::"ViewDocument", resource: Document::""
context: {is_authenticated: false}
entities: [
  User::"" {
    blocked: [],
    org: Organization::"",
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
  Action::"ModifyGroup",
  Document::"" {
    isPrivate: true,
    manageACL: DocumentShare::"",
    modifyACL: DocumentShare::"A",
    owner: User::"",
    publicAccess: "view",
    viewACL: DocumentShare::"B",
  },
  DocumentShare::"B",
  DocumentShare::"A",
  Action::"CreateGroup",
  Action::"EditPublicAccess",
  Action::"ViewDocument",
  Public::"",
  Action::"EditIsPrivate",
  DocumentShare::"",
  Action::"AddToShareACL",
  Action::"CreateDocument",
  Action::"ModifyDocument",
  Action::"DeleteDocument",
  Group::"" {
    owner: User::"",
  },
  Organization::"",
  Action::"DeleteGroup",
]

results.description: Group owner MUST be able to DeleteGroup when authenticated
ViewDocument for User is not trivially deny-all
ModifyDocument is not trivially deny-all
DeleteDocument is not trivially deny-all
AddToShareACL is not trivially deny-all
DeleteGroup is not trivially deny-all
CreateDocument is not trivially deny-all

stages.name: semantic
stages.message: One or more semantic checks failed.
